comments: Seen on Craigleith and bass rock
Seen briefly; bird that has been around for the past day
One flew over slowly heading inland
Female type circling north over houses.
Presumably an injured bird, as it ran out to the tideline, rather than fly.
Drake - assuming it's the long-staying (apparently resident) bird?

comments: 2 pairs, with broods of 5 + 7 downy goslings.
1 female with 4 very young ducklings + 3 drakes.
Appeared to be attempting to distract a Magpie away from area of usual nest site.
Estimate of occupied nests on small island.
These birds are seen at this location throughout the year
Recorded using Merlin on a Motorola phone.
